message:
Fix potential out-of-bounds read in verify_pedal_programming

The original code checked `len >= 4` but one response format accessed
`response[4]`, which requires at least 5 bytes. Move length checks
into each branch to match the actual bytes accessed:
- Format [cmd, pedal, mod, key, ...]: needs >= 4 bytes
- Format [0, cmd, pedal, mod, key, ...]: needs >= 5 bytes
- Format [pedal, mod, key, ...]: needs >= 3 bytes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
